heading: Download Audit Logs
body:
To download your stream processing workspace audit logs:

**Download-log-spi-cli:**

Atlas CLI

To download audit logs for one stream processing workspace you specify using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas api streams downloadAuditLogs [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas api streams downloadAuditLogs](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-api-streams-downloadAuditLogs).

**Download-log-spi-ui:**

Atlas UI

Click . From the dropdown
menu, select Audit Logs.

In the modal window, select a Time Period
from the dropdown menu. This value determines the logging
interval used to delimit events in the downloadable log file.

**Download-log-spi-api:**

Atlas Administration API

The Atlas Administration API provides an endpoint for creating a
stream processing workspace.

[Download Audit Logs for One Atlas Stream Processing Workspace](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-downloadgroupstreamauditlogs)
